user.title: Set up Besen BS20
user.description: Enter the Bluetooth address and PIN for your charger.

data_description.address: The BLE address of the charger advertising as ACP#...
data_description.pin: The 6-digit Bluetooth PIN configured on the charger.
data_description.sync_clock: Update the charger's internal clock during heartbeat handling.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Set up {name}
bluetooth_confirm.description: Enter the 6-digit Bluetooth PIN for this charger.

data_description.pin: The 6-digit Bluetooth PIN configured on the charger.
data_description.sync_clock: Update the charger's internal clock during heartbeat handling.

reauth_confirm.title: Update Besen BS20 PIN
reauth_confirm.description: The charger rejected the configured PIN. Enter the current 6-digit PIN.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the charger. Check Bluetooth proxy range and active connection support.

abort.no_connectable_path: No connectable Bluetooth path is available for this charger.

command_failed.message: The charger did not accept the command.

no_connectable_path.title: No connectable Bluetooth path
no_connectable_path.description: The charger is visible, but Home Assistant cannot reach it through an adapter or Bluetooth proxy that supports active GATT connections. Move an active ESPHome Bluetooth proxy closer to the charger or add a supported Bluetooth adapter.

reauth_required.title: Besen BS20 PIN rejected
reauth_required.description: The charger rejected the configured PIN. Reauthenticate the integration with the current 6-digit PIN.
